methods.description: Statistical procedures used to analyze differences in physiological responses of cells between +Fe and +DFB treatments using ANOVA, t-tests, and Levene's test for homogeneity of variance.

steps.description: Differences in physiological responses of cells between +Fe and +DFB treatments were assessed using a one-way analysis of variance (ANOVA) or standard t test (α = 0.05).
steps.searchable_summary: perform one-way ANOVA or t-test to assess differences in physiological responses

steps.description: To ensure that the assumption of equal variances for all parametric tests was satisfied, a Levene's test for homogeneity of variance was applied to all data a priori.
steps.searchable_summary: apply Levene's test for homogeneity of variance

steps.description: In the case of the pigment data where the +DFB treatment only had two replicates due to biomass limitations, a power analysis was performed on the ANOVA to check for type II error probability.
steps.searchable_summary: perform power analysis on ANOVA for pigment data

steps.description: All analyses were performed using Minitab statistical software (version 15.1.0.0 2006, PA, USA).
steps.searchable_summary: use Minitab software for statistical analysis
